mapper.select: SELECT ca.*, a.brand || ' ' || a.serial_no as assetName, a.location, a.asset_no as assetNo, a.maintenance_id as maintenanceId, a.type as assetType, a.brand, a.serial_no as serialNo, a.create_time as createTime, a.operator as assetOperator FROM bus_check_asset ca LEFT JOIN bus_asset a ON ca.asset_id = a.id WHERE ca.check_id = #{checkId}
